ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company behind the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the genre is primary for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director in the movie (e.g., director, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "is_watched" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the movie has been watched by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, search, rating, watchlist addition) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, backdrop, screenshot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_images_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie associated with the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., trailer, teaser, clip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_videos_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., user_count, movie_views) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
